# LobsterMail

> Email infrastructure for AI agents. Your agent creates its own inbox and starts sending in seconds — no human signup required.

LobsterMail is an agent-first email platform. Agents self-provision inboxes via API or SDK, send and receive real email, and safely consume email content with built-in prompt injection detection.

## Skill File

If you are an AI agent looking to use LobsterMail, start here:

- [Skill Page](https://lobstermail.ai/skill): Full setup instructions, SDK reference, MCP tools, REST API, and pricing — everything an agent needs to use LobsterMail
- Skill API endpoint: `https://api.lobstermail.ai/skill`

## Docs

- [Getting Started](https://lobstermail.ai/docs/getting-started): Install the SDK and create your first inbox
- [Agent Quickstart](https://lobstermail.ai/docs/agent-quickstart): End-to-end guide for autonomous agents
- [Receiving Emails](https://lobstermail.ai/docs/receiving-emails): Poll for messages, lazy-load bodies, filter by sender
- [Sending Emails](https://lobstermail.ai/docs/sending-emails): Queue-based sending with retry and validation
- [Webhooks](https://lobstermail.ai/docs/webhooks): HMAC-signed real-time notifications on new email
- [Custom Domains](https://lobstermail.ai/docs/custom-domains): DNS verification and DKIM setup
- [Security & Prompt Injection](https://lobstermail.ai/docs/security-and-prompt-injection): 6-category injection scanner, `safeBodyForLLM()`, SPF/DKIM/DMARC validation
- [MCP Server](https://lobstermail.ai/docs/mcp-server): Use LobsterMail from any MCP-compatible AI agent
- [API Reference](https://lobstermail.ai/docs/api-reference): Full OpenAPI 3.1 spec — 20 endpoints

## SDK

- npm: `lobstermail`
- `LobsterMail.create()` — auto-signup, token persistence
- `createSmartInbox()` — intelligent naming with collision handling
- `inbox.waitForEmail()` — poll with exponential backoff and filters
- `email.safeBodyForLLM()` — safe content formatting for LLM consumption
- `connect()` — WebSocket real-time push

## Pricing

- **Free**: 5 inboxes, receive email, no credit card required
- **Free Verified**: Unlock sending (10/day) by verifying via X (Twitter)
- **Builder** ($9/mo): 10 inboxes, 500 sends/day, 3 custom domains
- **Pro** ($19/mo): 20 inboxes, 1,000 sends/day, 5 custom domains
- **Scale** ($99/mo): 300 inboxes, 10,000 sends/day, 25 custom domains

## Key Pages

- [Homepage](https://lobstermail.ai)
- [Documentation](https://lobstermail.ai/docs)
- [Blog](https://lobstermail.ai/blog)
- [Install the Skill](https://lobstermail.ai/skill)
- [Terms of Service](https://lobstermail.ai/terms)

## API Base URL

`https://api.lobstermail.ai`

## Authentication

Bearer token. Format: `lm_sk_live_...` (production) or `lm_sk_test_...` (development). No passwords or email verification — agents authenticate with API keys only.
